overall.description: Gameplay footage from Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character web-swinging and wall-crawling through a snowy New York City. The clip transitions from night-time navigation between modern glass skyscrapers to daytime high-speed swinging through older brick neighborhoods, with the character wearing a distinctive Santa hat throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern downtown canyon between glass skyscrapers

events.description: Spider-Man transitions from wall-crawling vertically to launching into a web-swing
character releases web line and freefalls briefly before shooting new web

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man wearing a red Santa hat wall-crawls up a curved glass skyscraper then swings between modern high-rise buildings

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade curving along the street
boxy high-rise with grid-patterned illuminated windows
skyscraper with illuminated 'COLEXCO' signage at the top
beige stone building with columns and ornate roof details

segments.scene_description: At night in a snowy modern downtown, Spider-Man scales a curved glass skyscraper wearing a Santa hat. The character launches into aerial acrobatics between illuminated towers, with the COLEXCO building visible in the distance and city lights twinkling below.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered urban avenue lined with brick apartment buildings

events.description: abrupt transition from night to overcast day, shifting from modern glass towers to older brick architecture
character accelerates into high-speed web-swinging, gaining altitude above the street
passing over police station building with visible signage while maintaining high speed

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man swings rapidly between brick buildings, diving and ascending through the snowy city streets with fluid momentum

entered.detail: red and brown brick residential buildings with fire escapes and snow-covered roofs
classic wooden water towers atop building roofs
building with illuminated 'POLICE' signage on the facade
snow-covered avenue with tire tracks and parked cars visible below

segments.scene_description: Transitioning to a snowy overcast day, the scene shifts to older brick neighborhoods. Spider-Man swings at high speed between red-brick apartment buildings and water towers, soaring above snow-covered streets with parked cars and scattered pedestrians below. The character passes a police station building while maintaining rapid aerial momentum through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a nocturnal ascent of modern glass towers into a high-speed daylight journey through historic brick neighborhoods. It begins at night with Spider-Man, wearing a Santa hat, scaling a curved glass skyscraper before launching into aerial acrobatics between illuminated towers and the distant COLEXCO building. As the lighting shifts from the twinkling city lights of midnight to a snowy overcast day, the environment transforms from sleek skyscrapers into a dense urban canyon of red-brick apartment buildings. The camera then maintains rapid momentum, swinging past water towers and a police station while soaring above snow-covered streets filled with parked cars and pedestrians.
